corporate.note: Base rate entities (turnover < AUD 50M) pay 25%; large companies pay 30%

personal_income_tax.note: Stage 3 tax cuts effective 1 July 2024; tax-free threshold AUD 18,200

consumption_tax.note: 10% GST; ATO BAS reporting quarterly or monthly

superannuation.note: Super Guarantee rate rises annually; reaches 12% in FY2025-26

medicare_levy.note: 2% of taxable income; low-income thresholds and surcharge apply

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Entity type, local, provincial/state, surtax, relief, filing, withholding, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, municipal, provincial/state, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
